text: A refrigerator with two doors and a freezer drawer.
An old fashioned double decker bus is cruising the street.
A man and a woman holding surfboards on the beach.
many luggage bags on the ground near each other
a woman on skis standing on some snow
A small kitchen with a sink and a hot plate.
A young bow sitting in a chair eating food.
Small piece of chocolate cake on a white plate.
A line of ladies with pink frills and parasols pass by a beer gutted man.
A woman sitting at a table with a  pizza in front of her.
